title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise multi-hop queries, multi-agent validation as a safety layer, symbolic guardrails implemented in code rather than prompts, and runtime steering for self-correction. Each technique is demonstrated with code examples and real token usage metrics.
